title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs Global Group - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs Global Group - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Ola Cabs Global Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Meerut office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
